items.claim: Conor McGregor is 37 years old, which makes his recovery from a horrific injury more difficult compared to a younger fighter.
items.quote: We're talking about a 37-year-old fellow here in Conor McGregor, which he's coming back after horrific injury

items.claim: Dominick Cruz had to completely change his fighting style after his injuries because his knees could no longer support his previous movement.
items.quote: But it was But he had to completely change his fighting style. And that takes time. That takes an awful lot of work in the gym because his footwork was Dom Dom was famous for having this incredible hitty-gatty kind of in-and-out footwork... He couldn't move like that anymore because his knees had shot a bit.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's left hand power remains intact despite his time away from the sport.
items.quote: Last thing to go is power. Left hand has always been his big thing. The power will still be there.

items.claim: Max Holloway is a smart fighter who knows how to manage a fight.
items.quote: He's smart. He knows what he's doing.

items.claim: Conor McGregor will fade and begin to take damage if he fails to finish Max Holloway in the first round.
items.quote: But if Conor can't do him in the first round, he's going to fade. He's going to start taking damage.

items.claim: Max Holloway will begin to dominate the fight around the third round.
items.quote: Max is going to start putting the numbers on him, and then I I think he starts to crumble around the third round.

items.claim: Max Holloway has a psychological advantage because he can look at Conor McGregor's recent losses to Dustin Poirier and feel confident.
items.quote: He can look at him losing to Dustin Poirier twice in a row and think I just beat Dustin.
